scripts.dev: concurrently -n remote,host,server -c magenta,cyan,green "npm run dev -w @hackathon/abtest-remote" "npm run dev -w @hackathon/host" "npm run dev -w @hackathon/server"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @hackathon/abtest-remote && npm run build -w @hackathon/host && npm run build -w @hackathon/server
